aw-med.d: An Aisle Wing is placed at a 90 degree angle to the shelf. It allows for highly impactful brand communication in store.
ds: Overall size: Width 180mm × Height 455mm
Portrait — Printed both sides. Mirror images to be supplied.
Primedia Instore Logo or “PRIMEDIA INSTORE” copy (Arial 6pt) required on artwork.
Bleed: minimum 5mm added to overall size
ar: All images used in design to be high resolution 300 dpi CMYK 100% scale.
(Adobe Photoshop standard profile - US Web Coated (SWOP) V2
Material to be supplied in Adobe .pdf format with the page setup to include bleed.
Fonts to be supplied (embedded in the Adobe .pdf file) or converted to paths.
Please ensure that mirror images are supplied.
All die lines to be in spot colour and set to overprint.
pr: Printed 4 Process (full colour) front only on HI-Q Titan (Gloss), 200g/m², White
Gloss Laminated One side Only
Mounted to both sides of 2mm forex
Custom die made from supplied die trace
aw-med.pk:
(WHEN SUPPLYING PRINTED MATERIAL TO PRIMEDIA INSTORE)
All printed material must be packed flat in corrugated boxes.
All boxes must be clearly labeled with: Client name, brand name, media service descriptor
(i.e. Aisle Wing Medium) and quantity supplied..

aw-med-po.d: An Aisle Wing is placed at a 90 degree angle to the shelf. It allows for highly impactful brand communication in store.
ds: Overall size : Width 180 mm x Height 455 mm
Portrait (Printed both sides). Mirror images to be supplied.
Primedia Instore Logo or “PRIMEDIA INSTORE” copy (Arial 6pt) needs to be included on the artwork.
Bleed: a minimum of 5 mm bleed to be added to overall size
Pop-Out size: Width 148mm x Height 210mm (Pop-out to be no bigger than A5).
It can be placed anywhere on the Aisle Wing.
ar: All images used in design to be high resolution 300 dpi CMYK 100% scale.
(Adobe Photoshop standard profile - US Web Coated (SWOP) V2
Material to be supplied in Adobe .pdf format with the page setup to include bleed.
Fonts to be supplied (embedded in the Adobe .pdf file) or converted to paths.
Please ensure that mirror images are supplied.
All die lines to be in spot colour and set to overprint.

i: Printed 4 Process (full colour) front only on HI-Q Titan (Gloss), 200g/m², White
Mounted to both sides of 2mm forex
Custom die made from supplied die trace
Printed CMYK one side only on 300 Gsm Printkote
Gloss laminated, Die cut to shape
Attached to the Aisle Wing using SVA45 Foam

aw-med-po.pk:
All printed material must be packed flat in corrugated boxes.
All boxes must be clearly labeled with: Client name, brand name, media service descriptor

pr: Print Ready Artwork Supplied. Supply Soft Proof for Approval.
4 colour process on the face.
Spinning Mechanism: 4 colour process on both sides.

Spinning Mechanism: J_PALBOARD W/W/W 5mm.
Zund Crease & Route To Shape & Size
Glue & make up With Rotating element.
